name: Avocado and Pomegranate Salad
recipeInstructions:
DRESSING
1 teaspoon sugar
4 tablespoons white wine vinegar
2 tablespoons corn oil
2 tablespoons peanut oil
4 tablespoons fresh mint leaves, chopped
Salt and pepper
1. Peel the avocados, remove the pits, and slice into thick half rings.
2. Drop the avocado slices into a bowl containing water and lemon juice to prevent them from turning black.
3. Cut the pomegranate in half and crush it over a bowl, collecting the seeds. Wash the grapes and mix them with pomegranate seeds. Drain the avocado pieces and add them to the fruit.
4. To make the dressing, combine all ingredients in a glass jar. Screw the lid on firmly and shake vigorously for 2 minutes. Pour the dressing over the avocado and fruit.
5. Toss well before serving.
